actor_claims.quote_text: the Company receives an unsolicited alternative proposal from a third party

actor_claims.actor_label: any person that has made, or is considering making an alternative proposal
actor_claims.quote_text: any person that has made, or is considering making an alternative proposal

event_claims.actor_label: the Company and its affiliates and their respective representatives
event_claims.description: Under the merger agreement, the Company, its affiliates and their representatives may not solicit, initiate, knowingly encourage or facilitate alternative proposals or related inquiries, discussions or offers.
event_claims.quote_text:
Under the merger agreement, the Company and its affiliates and their respective representatives may not:

•

solicit, initiate or knowingly encourage or facilitate the making or submission of an alternative proposal

event_claims.actor_label: the Company and its affiliates and their respective representatives
event_claims.description: Under the merger agreement, the Company, its affiliates and their representatives may not participate in discussions or negotiations regarding an alternative proposal or furnish nonpublic information to a person that has made or is considering an alternative proposal, except to notify that person of the non-solicitation provisions.
event_claims.quote_text: participate in any discussions or negotiations regarding an alternative proposal with, or furnish any nonpublic information regarding the Company or its subsidiaries in connection with an alternative proposal to, any person that has made, or is considering making an alternative proposal

event_claims.actor_label: the Company and its affiliates and their respective representatives
event_claims.description: Under the merger agreement, the Company, its affiliates and their representatives may not enter into a letter of intent, agreement in principle, merger or acquisition agreement or other agreement relating to or providing for an alternative proposal, except for permitted confidentiality agreements.
event_claims.quote_text: enter into any letter of intent, agreement in principle, merger or acquisition agreement or any other agreement relating to or providing for any alternative proposal

event_claims.description: Before the required stockholder vote, if the Company receives an unsolicited alternative proposal from a third party that the board judges to constitute or reasonably be expected to result in a superior proposal, the Company may provide nonpublic information to the third party after entering into an acceptable confidentiality agreement.
event_claims.quote_text:
the Company may take the following actions:

•

provide nonpublic information to the third party after entering into a confidentiality agreement acceptable under the terms of the merger agreement

event_claims.description: Before the required stockholder vote, if the Company receives an unsolicited alternative proposal from a third party that the board judges to constitute or reasonably be expected to result in a superior proposal, the Company may engage in discussions or negotiations with that third party regarding the alternative proposal.
event_claims.quote_text: engage in discussions or negotiations with a third party with respect to the alternative proposal

event_claims.description: To change its recommendation or terminate the merger agreement to accept a superior proposal, the Company must provide Parent written notice of the board's intention and describe the superior proposal's terms.
event_claims.quote_text: provide Parent written notice of the board’s intention to make a change in recommendation or to terminate the merger agreement with a description of the terms of the superior proposal

event_claims.description: The Company must provide Parent three business days to propose changes to the merger agreement, with extensions for material changes in the superior proposal, and negotiate with Parent in good faith during that period.
event_claims.quote_text: provide Parent with three business days to propose changes to the terms of the merger agreement (which will be extended for additional two business day periods for any material change in the superior proposal), and during this period negotiate with Parent in good faith to make adjustments to the terms and conditions of the merger agreement

event_claims.description: The Company may terminate the merger agreement before the Company stockholder meeting to accept a superior proposal if it pays Parent a $255 million termination fee and then enters into a definitive agreement for the superior proposal.
event_claims.quote_text: at any time prior to the Company stockholder meeting to accept a “superior proposal”

event_claims.description: Parent may terminate the merger agreement if the board takes an action constituting a change of recommendation before the stockholder meeting to adopt the merger agreement.
event_claims.quote_text: if the board takes an action that constitutes a change of recommendation (as defined below under The Merger Agreement — Other Covenants and Agreements — No Solicitation ) prior to the stockholder meeting to adopt the merger agreement

event_claims.description: The Company will pay Parent a $255 million termination fee if it terminates the merger agreement before stockholder approval in response to a superior proposal and promptly enters into a definitive agreement for that proposal.
event_claims.quote_text: the Company has terminated the merger agreement before stockholder approval of the merger proposal is obtained in response to a superior proposal and promptly after such termination the Company enters into a definitive agreement with respect to such superior proposal

event_claims.description: The Company will pay Parent a $255 million termination fee if Parent terminates the merger agreement due to a change of recommendation.
event_claims.quote_text: Parent has terminated the merger agreement in the event of a change of recommendation
